classification.reason: AllowRemoteDASD is backed by phase-0 baseline existence, an exact current-build ntoskrnl value-name hit, a naturally resolved current-build Ghidra route to the removable-storage policy path, and a shell-safe intended-path ETW lane that remained a clean no-hit. That is enough to keep the candidate visible, but not enough to treat the intended Session Manager I/O path as cross-layer verified.
